name: fika-system
description: Fika Takeaway — monorepo (backend, mobile, web, member portal)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,web -c green,blue "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:web && npm run install:mobile && npm run install:member-portal
scripts.build:mobile: cd mobile && eas build --platform android --profile production
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:reset: cd backend && npx prisma migrate reset
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
